description: Extensive readings in advanced general and specialized texts in contemporary Chinese, and discussion on the content of the reading materials. Conducted in Chinese. Students with prior experience in the language are required to take a placement test administered by the department. Not open to students with credit for E ASIAN 401 prior to Fall 2019.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 302(or E ASIAN 302 prior to Fall 2019)

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 302(or E ASIAN 302 prior to Fall 2019)
